raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint against Citibank regarding unauthorized XXXX  and/or XXXX XXXX  XXXX that occurred early XXXX through the end of XXXX and were reported in XXXX. 

These transactions were part of a single account takeover fraud event and involved numerous repetitive charges from the same merchant. Citi issued only a partial reimbursement, despite all transactions during this period being unauthorized. Which I dont see in any statement. They are only saying its happened. 

Citi improperly treated identical fraudulent transactions differently, reimbursing some while denying others ( never reimbursed from the start, they just said they did ). Additional unauthorized charges were moved to or reflected under Citi XXXX, and Citi asserted those balances were separate, despite being derived from the same fraudulent activity. 

Citi also pressured me to make payment on disputed fraudulent charges while the fraud case was open and terminated a call after I asserted my right to withhold payment under the Fair Credit Billing Act. 

I am requesting a formal reconsideration of fraud claims, full reimbursement of all unauthorized Whatnot-related transactions ( including those on Citi XXXX  ) , and confirmation that no payments, fees, interest, or negative credit reporting will occur.
